narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township S (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,143 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
